blended.narrative: Aspen Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,995 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 34".
